reviews.review_text: evet oyun çok güzel 4k şekilde 200 fps üstü alabiliyörum
ciekawa gierka zwłaszczs kiedy inni gracze kręcąsie jak wiertło od wiertatki
Слишком много читеров. Вероятность что вы играете с честным игроком намного меньше чем с читером. Причем, чем выше ранг тем больше читеров.
Выпускают кучу обновлений, но на античит абсолютно плевать. В каждой игре читеры, зато анимации новые.
anime queers and commie ruffians. nothin but.
vewy vewy kool game but tooooo many chweaters
yaxshi oyin cheterlar zaybal qiladi xuysnm ulaniya
this game will teach you how to speak russian, pretty cool isn't it?
This game is slowly destroying my mental health.
muito bom, mas tirando os argentino.
Все ваще четко,как индеец в ванной

Simple , competitive and no superfluous abilities. The game's been in constant improvement since the ages.  The success of the game is very much obvious by the amout of players in-game everyday. Nothing is more dope than having CT and T fighthing against eachother without ass abilities. This game demands pure aim. I enjoy this game and play on a daily basis.
cs sempre vai ser o melhor jogo.
крашит каждые 30 -40 мин ... невменяемых сопливых отпрысков лет по 7-9   (с праймом) - тьма !!! устаёшь глушить голос ... в целом помойка
没有杂七杂八，只有对枪法纯粹的热爱
si queres cagarte a tiros el cs es la mejor opcion

Sou novo no jogo e vim do Valorant. Lá eu era Imortal 3, então posso dizer que tenho uma mira boa. Acabei perdendo algumas partidas porque o meu próprio time me kickou, dizendo que eu estava usando hack.
Sinceramente, vocês podiam melhorar isso. Esse sistema de kick só faz a gente perder tempo à toa. Não faz sentido ser removido da partida sem motivo.
Es un juego lleno de xiteros y valve les chupa la pija a todos los xiteros asi nunca van a dejar de existir los xiteros
can be the most fun or the most depressing game of your life, really affects my life after a horrific loss
JOGO MT BOM NÃO TEM CHEATERS

If you are into CBC you will love counterstrike, I could have had the best day of my whole life and the nanosecond steam opens counterstrike it drains all the joy and positive energy from my body, I will be playing this for another 100 hours
LoL  nothing to say. Great anchi-cheat keep it up VALVE
good game or bad game, idn
非常好游戏，使我的同学孙伟哲燃尽
a lot of cheaters please bring back Overwatch

This is the tactical shooter game you want to be playing. The game is free to play, prime is really good if you cant afford it it is a one time buy and you keep getting weekly drops for playing the game. I will recommend the game.
My friend ask do you really played this game i answered :CYKA BLYAT IDI NAHUI
dommage ya des cheaters et qu'il faut payé 100000000 euros pour être ranké FF
Terminals are absolutely retarded, I genuienly hope whoever brought that idea up at a conference falls in a deep terminal delirium state incapable of recovering.
beautiful game would recommed if you like first person shooters. very tactical and quick action think required to playt this game.
o jogo e bem competitivo acaba com o seu mental mas diverte e acaba com o tedio quer uma dica ? nao começe apenas nao começe , pq eu coemçei com cs e dps fui pra eroina e pro krek
I just adore this game and cannot stop playing it. FIX MM!!!11!11!

Oh boy, where do I even begin with CS2 — the shining beacon of competitive integrity, the absolute gold standard of “nothing shady ever happens here.”

Let’s start with the anti-cheat, because WOW. This thing is on another level. It’s so advanced, so cutting-edge, that it doesn’t even *need* to catch cheaters. It just lets them express themselves. Freedom of gameplay, you know? You got a guy tracing you perfectly through walls? That’s not cheats — that’s passion. Dedication. Probably drank 17

JUEGO CS HACE MUCHOS AÑOS, LAMENTABLE COMO ARRUINAN EL JUEGO POR UN POCO DE GUITA Y LE REGALAN TODO A LOS CHEATERS, VALVE ES UN ASCO ABSOLUTO, LO DIGO CON TODO CARIÑO A ESTE JUEGO DESDE QUE LO JUEGO AL CS 1.5, LAMENTABLEMENTE UNA LAGRIMA EL JUEGUITO
JUEGO DE RE MIERDA HERMOSO TE AMO0 Y TE ODIO

Es un juego increíblemente inclusivo: vas a encontrarte con todo tipo de “habilidades”, desde dificultades cognitivas hasta problemas motrices, visuales o auditivos… pero tranquilo, eso solo en tu team.

Del otro lado, en cambio, te espera un seleccionado internacional de profesionales o, en su defecto, un grupo de iluminados con el DLC “aimbot + wallhack premium”.

Después de algunas recomendaciones (muy amables, por cierto), al enterarse de que soy mujer, he decidido seguir el consejo de la co
If you want to have high tier depression and want you ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ reamed. Play this game
jogo muito divertido e players otimos

Es un juego donde esta  lleno de personas con problemas serios , gente que se mete con tus familiares  y dicen obscenidades que te dejan replanteandonte si vale la pena seguir jugando a esta mierda y la respuesta es que si lo vale
VERY GOOD GAME. BETTER THAN MOST LANGUAGE APPS.
çok güzel bir oyun tavsiye ederim
o jogo e bom pa carai

besides all the cheaters and also the eastern european people who dont even try to speak english so everyone can understand each other causing there to be no communication or team play, its a solid game.
game has lots of european...very good. they call me bad words but is ok.

1.Токсичное комьюнити.
2.Называют толстым, хотя это футболка XLLLL меня полнит.
3.Называют моего друга хохлом и докапываются до его глаз( хотя я этого бы не советовал, ведь он купил перчатки для ММА и сходил на пробное занятие).
Te pueden tocar 2 tipos de brazucas, los mancos que te generan una hernia o los mancos que te bajan el cortisol a base de humor

I like counter strike 2 because its skill-based and competitive game. it feels rewarding  when you improve and play well . the graphics  look  and feel clean , the game is intense  and fun  overall  i just enjoy playing it
I love to play cs, it is a very fun game. u met a lot of funny and nice people there. trust me u have to try it!

É muito bom, mesmo assim tem seus problemas com hacks, que é completamente invisibilizado na maioria dos casos, e quando e feito muitos deles apenas criam uma nova conta, já que banimento desse jogo não é para o pc. Mesmo assim acredito que tenha salvação, em algum momento no fundo do poço tem algo bom, que te faz pensar que isso vale a pena, o que é esse algo é o sentimento de evolução e o chat por voz consegue ser bem engraçado caso você seja homem.

Jogo esse jogo a 4 anos, e até agora não vi nenhuma atualização favorável no combate ao uso de cheats. Quanto mais você gasta na plataforma e no jogo, a valve faz vista grossa para o que você faz de errado. Só compensa jogar esse jogo se você for usuário de cheats ou se for jogar em plataformas externas: Face it/ Gamers club, etc... De Resto, pode enterrar esse jogo, enquanto é cedo.
sinir bozucu ama bir o kadar da çok sanıyor
Don't waste money or time on a game where the owners don't waste any money 2 to 3 years back.
Great Game. Will drain ur bank acc tho if you play enough and have ego issues.......
good game tbh its pre fun

news.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
news.author: jo
news.contents: \Adjusted ground smoothing at locations where the player can stand on very thin ledges.\Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.\Corrected some improper character texture assignments.Trade offers containing Counter-Strike 2 items are now limited to 1,000 items.

news.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
news.author: jo
news.contents: \Adjusted camera motion due to recoil to match CS:GO more closely. Bullet trajectories should continue to match CS2.Players will now experience the full camera motion due to external sources of aim punch (e.g. getting shot) regardless of network latency. The effects of aim punch on bullet trajectories are still applied immediately on the server.\Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.Fixed several cases where crouch transitions in the air were instantaneous.Fixed a bug where MVP panel charact

news.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
news.author: jo
news.contents: \Fixed a bug that removed the delay between burst fire bullets.

news.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
news.author: Piggles ULTRAPRO
news.contents: All changes from the animgraph_2_beta build are now live.\Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.Adjusted general weapon deploy animation logic.Fixed issues with transitioning between knife attacks.Fixed Elites not shooting in third-person. \Fixed a bug that allowed silently climbing ladders at run speed by sporadically tapping movement keys.Adjusted ground smoothing at locations where sloped ground surfaces transition to flat ground.Fixed held grenades inheriting incorrect scale in some circ

news.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
news.author: jo
news.contents: The following changes are available in the animgraph_2_beta build. To opt into the beta build, follow the instructions here: https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4ATo report bugs or provide feedback about the beta build, please email csgoteamfeedback@valvesoftware.com with the subject "AG2 Beta".\Fixed viewmodel and worldmodel HE grenade throwAdjusted foot IK when idleMinor polish for turn animations when plantingFixed fast-weapon switching when holding inspectMinor adjust
